final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original editorial-style photo of Korean cafe coffee and desserts, with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays, styled for Instagram — no people.

Style/medium: needs a Korean-cafe smartphone-shot aesthetic with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlay — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include hand-drawn white outlines tracing each object's silhouette, arrow/dashed-line sight guides connecting annotations to subjects, and deliberate negative space to avoid overcrowding
Subject: must include stylish coffee drink(s) and dessert(s) typical of a Korean cafe, no people
Scene/backdrop: must include a Korean cafe setting as context
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, fashionable cafe atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a muted, trendy Korean-cafe direction — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a rough, slightly uneven single-stroke white-pen line quality for all annotations — exact line weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include handwritten Japanese annotations (7割ひらがな・3割かんじ) in diary/monologue tone for each element — verbatim examples per category:
  飲み物 → taste/temperature/mood (e.g. 「さっぱり」「やさしい甘さ」「ほっとする…」)
  食べ物 → texture/deliciousness (e.g. 「しっとり」「さいこう」)
  空間 → atmosphere (e.g. 「落ち着く」「いい時間」)
  全体 → one-line summary (e.g. 「幸せすぎた〜」)
  decorative elements: steam wisps ♡ sparkles ✦ small emoticons — used sparingly
Constraints: must preserve Instagram Stories / rough-magazine-notes finish; annotation lines must look hand-drawn (one-stroke, slightly uneven), not digital-clean; white pen style throughout; no over-decoration — keep breathing room
Avoid: people or human figures; overly polished digital vector lines; cluttered annotations that fill all negative space
